label: Stage program begins
description: Evelyn, Felix, and Lena appear before the atrium audience.

label: Minor corridor incident reported
description: Witnesses describe Simon being jostled near Service Corridor C but continuing the gala.

label: Simon gives keynote speech
description: Simon speaks to donors and appears composed, though some witnesses notice subtle word errors.

label: Daniel visits Simon's office
description: Daniel gives Simon water and leaves after a brief private exchange.

label: Simon speaks with Rachel
description: Rachel notes strange wording but does not treat it as an emergency.

label: Incomplete email drafted
description: Simon begins an incomplete email referencing C, accounts, and corridor.

label: Office locks from inside
description: Door logs show Simon locking the office from inside.

label: Presumed time of fatal office blow
description: The initial reconstruction places Simon's collapse near the bronze model around this time.

label: Simon found dead
description: Security opens the locked office under emergency protocol.
